opts: Hold the puck behind your net and wait for a better look to open up
Thread the stretch pass to the center — they're breaking and open
Rim the puck hard around the boards to clear your own zone of pressure
Skate it up the middle yourself and try to beat both forecheckers on your own
Commit fully to the backhand side since you already started — trust your first read and drop into a butterfly over there
Stop your feet immediately and try to reset — don't fully commit to the fake
Dive across the crease flat on your pads to cover both posts at once
Skate further out to challenge
Let the puck slide out of the zone
Skate to the puck and keep it in the zone
Back up toward the blue line to give yourself more room to react
Skate to the front of the net
Crash the net hard right away and look for a rebound chance in tight
Put pressure on the D so they can't make an easy breakout pass
Wait at the blue line for your linemates to catch up before forechecking
Skate back to the red line
Into the corner to help battle for the puck
Up the boards — give the D an outlet
Into the slot to screen the goalie
To the far blue line
Try to score a shorthanded goal
Keep the puck away from dangerous areas and get it out of your zone
Collapse into a tight box in front of the net and block every shot lane
Pressure the puck carrier hard every single time they touch the puck
Shoot right away before the defenders get close
Look up and read what's happening — find the best play
Skate into the corner and let your winger pick up the puck
Pass backward to your defenseman
Pass right away since it's a 2-on-1 — the defender can't block the lane yet
Drive wide to force the defender to fully commit first, then decide
Shoot from where you are
Pull up and regroup at the blue line
Attack anyway — you still have some speed
Pull up, regroup, and get set up properly
Dump it in deep and chase hard to recover
Pass back to your defenseman at the point
Go help in the corner — two players on the puck
Hold the front of the net — don't leave it empty
Skate to the blue line and wait for a clearing pass
Go up high for a stretch outlet from the defense
Go straight at the D full speed to force a rushed play
Cut off the pass to the left — force the D to go right instead
Stop and stay in the middle to block a shot back the other way
Drop back to the blue line
Drive hard straight to the net
Peel off and go to the weak side — create a triangle of options
Pull up at the blue line
Follow the puck carrier into the corner and support the battle down low
Try to power through the defender on the boards and muscle to the net
Use a quick spin move or chip the puck off the boards to your winger
Pass between the defender's legs
Fall to draw a penalty
Try to carry the puck out to the left side fast
Spin to the right and find your open defenseman
Stop and wait for the forechecker to commit
Shoot it down the ice
Get out of the goalie's line of sight so they can track the puck
Screen the goalie and be ready to tip or deflect the shot
Skate to the corner to grab the rebound
Drop to the half-wall to be an outlet for a pass out of traffic
Pressure every single pass the second it leaves their stick — force mistakes
When they slow down or seem to be setting up a shot — not on every pass
Every time the puck is near the boards
Only when the puck gets to the point
Try to deke past both defenders and work your way toward the net alone
Protect the puck along the boards and wait for a teammate to support
Pass into the slot blindly
Shoot from where you are
Try to power through and hold the puck against the boards
Bank a quick pass off the boards to your half-wall winger
Spin and skate into the middle ice
Shoot the puck on net from down low in the corner
Skate full speed straight at the puck carrier and try to poke it away from behind
Skate back hard on the weak side — get between the second attacker and the net
Go straight to the net to support your goalie
Peel off to the bench for a quick change
Wait until all three forwards are lined up across the neutral zone together
Go immediately — the 3-on-1 window closes fast as the other team gets back
Regroup at your own blue line first
Dump the puck deep and change lines
Keep cycling — pass back down to the corner and try again on the next rotation
Shoot immediately into the open slot or pass to a teammate breaking there
Hold the puck
Drop the puck back to the point defenseman
Skate straight at the defender full speed and try to blow by them wide
Skate with control, read their skates, and make a move when they commit
Shoot right away from the far blue line before the defender can close off
Slow way down and wait for help
Stay with the attacker you started with — never switch assignments in your own zone
Take the attacker coming to your side, let your partner clean up their original man
Call for the referee
Back up to the crease
High to the blocker side — beat them over the shoulder
Low and to one side — an aggressive goalie is exposed low
Straight at them
Deke around the goalie
Skate straight to the bench and get off the ice
Pressure the puck carrier immediately to slow the breakout
Skate back toward your own blue line to set up defensively
Stand still and watch
Chase after the point man to pressure the shot from outside
Push the screener out of the crease area — your goalie needs to see
Stay in the passing lane
Back up toward your own goal line
Try a complex deke to beat the goalie since the defenseman is still behind you
Shoot as quickly as possible once you're in range — don't let the D recover
Pull up and wait for a teammate
Skate slowly to catch your breath
Slash their stick to move them
Get your body low and push them away from the crease — no penalty
Ignore the player in front and only focus on clearing the puck out of the slot
Lift their stick instead
Keep cycling — eventually the defenders will make a mistake if you're patient
Stop cycling — dump the puck deep, change lines, and come back with a new entry
Shoot from the corner
Pass the puck back to your D at the point
Stay deep on your goal line
Skate out to the top of the crease — cut the angle and take away net
Skate all the way out past the hash marks to challenge the shooter early
Drop into your butterfly
Back toward the shooter
To the right corner — opposite side from where the shot came
Straight up in the air so the whistle blows and play can stop
Anywhere in front of the net so a teammate can get to it
Stay high in the offensive zone and wait for a long stretch pass
Turn around and skate back toward your own zone
Stop and call for a pass
Stand still and watch
Turn around to face the defender
Put your body between the defender and the puck
Spin off the boards and try to skate through the defender
Pass the puck away right before the defender arrives
Try to skate out of the zone yourself
Pass immediately to your open D partner
Shoot the puck the length of the ice
Wait for a better option to open
Hold the puck and wait for the traffic in the slot to clear away
Shoot immediately — traffic in front means screens and rebounds
Pass cross-ice to the other point while reading the situation
Skate into the slot with it yourself
Skate straight at them full speed
Delay — use a D-to-D pass or drop pass to find a lane that opens up
Dump the puck in the zone deep
Regroup in your own zone and come back up the exact same side
Chase the puck into the corner
Hold your position and intercept the first outlet pass — you're the plug
Skate back hard to your defensive zone right away
Go to the bench
Pass the puck around your zone until a perfect breakout option opens up
Get the puck out of your zone as fast as possible — any clean clear is a win
Hold the puck in your corner to kill time off the penalty
Try to score a shorthanded goal
Watching the puck
Finding a man to cover
Skating to the blue
Waiting for a turnover
Race hard to the net for a tip-in chance
Stay high and be ready for a drop pass or rebound shot
Skate to the corner to cover the weak-side winger
Stop at the red line to backcheck early
Pass to the winger breaking to the net
Shoot at the exposed net immediately
Hold the puck and look for an option
Pass back to the defense at the point
Force the pass to the covered left winger and hope they can win a battle
Reverse — walk behind the net and find the open right side
Rim it around the boards
Hold the puck behind the net and wait for the forechecker to leave
